metadata.title: Copy as HTML
metadata.description: This is a simple plugin that converts the selected markdown to HTML and copies it to the clipboard.

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, removes wikilink brackets from copied text.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，则从复制的文本中删除Wiki链接括号")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, removes text styling such as bold, italics, and highlights.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，则删除文本样式，如粗体、斜体和高亮显示")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, removes text immediately after a hashtag.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，则立即删除标签及后面的文本")
